i18n.en: mand line.  Multiple -f options are allowed.
i18n.zh-CN: 从文件读取 awk 程序

i18n.en: writes  an assembler like listing of the internal representation of the program to stdout and exits  0  (on  successful  compila‐ tion).
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: Program text is read from file and this is the last option.
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: prints a usage message to stderr and exits (same as “-W usage”).
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: sets  unbuffered  writes  to stdout and line buffered reads from stdin.  Records from stdin are lines regardless of the value  of RS.
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: modifies mawk's behavior to be more POSIX-compliant:
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: calls  srand  with  the given parameter (and overrides the auto- seeding behavior).
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: adjusts the size of mawk's internal sprintf buffer to num bytes. More than rare use of this option indicates mawk should  be  re‐ compiled.
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: Omit  features  such as interval expressions which were not sup‐ ported by traditional awk.
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: prints a usage message to stderr and exits (same as “-W help”).
i18n.zh-CN: 兼容选项 / 实现专用扩展

i18n.en: mawk writes its version and copyright  to  stdout  and  compiled limits to stderr and exits 0.
